text: Tato, you free Saturday? Basement panel tripping again.
Saturday works. Sounds like a loose neutral. I'll bring the meter.
Good. Mila wants to see the bees too.
Bees are still wintered. Tell her spring. Bring her anyway.
Will do. See you 8.
Tato, did you eat? Call me tonight.
Ate. Call you after 7. Don't worry.
Always worry. New honey labels almost done.
Make the lettering bigger. Old customers can't read small.
Fine. Bringing prints when I visit. Love you.
Synku, you home safe? Call Sunday after church.
Home, Mamo. Call you Sunday 10, like always. Take your pills.
Ready for video. Kettle is on.
Calling now. Sent the usual this week, hryvnia moved, bit more for you.
Brandon. Fishing Sunday? Pennypack, early.
Yes. 5:30 my place, I bring coffee. You bring the worms.
Ha. Bring Yuengling too. Rematch on that Sicilian after.
Bring the Nimzowitsch. Still annoyed about Tuesday's game.
Brandon, Wednesday club on? Spring Open bracket needs a look.
On. Leave site by 5, there by 6:30. Bring the pairings printed.
Good. Registrations at 24. I'll print them.
Darren. Verree Road 7 AM. Bring fish tape and longer bits.
Got it. Loading the van tonight. See you 7.
Vitayu Brandon. Can you look at the center kitchen outlets Sunday?
Sunday afternoon. If it's just GFCIs it's quick. Bring what's on the truck.
Dyakuyu. Bringing honey to the bazaar too?
Brandon, send the Q4 invoice summary when you can.
Summary attached. Gross about 34k for the quarter. Honey in second tab.
Got it. Estimate by Friday. Looks clean.
Mamo, dobryi ranok. Kava vzhe hotova, chekayu na dzvinok.
Synku, ye elektryka. Bachu tebe. Yak Mila?
Mila healthy. Andriy send video yesterday. Show her drawing.
Sadok tsvite. Yabluni pochaly.
Send me photo when you can. Miss you.
Bees came through winter. All twelve alive.
Boh dopomahaye. Ty zavzhdy z bdzholamy.
Frost last night here. Lilacs confused.
Tak samo tut. Zima ne vidpuskaye.
Sent Western Union today. Should be there Tuesday.
Diakuyu synku. Ne treba tak bahato.
Ne khvyluysia. Vsyo dobre tut.
Knee surgery still September 8. Andriy will come.
Molyusya za tebe. Yikh dobri liudy.
Vasyl caught catfish yesterday. Big one. Photo coming.
Skazhy yomu privit. Kholodyachi rukava, ne zabud.
Katya wants come visit summer. She work too much.
Nekhay pryyide. Duzhe zhdu ii.
Chess club Spring Open in two weeks. Board is set.
Ty vsyo bilshe klub. Batko by pyshavsia.
Roman handle logistics. Only forty players this time.
Went to market Saturday. Sold all jars by ten.
Med solodkyi u tebe. Toi z Kharkova ne takyi.
Mila lost first tooth. Andriy show me Sunday.
Skazhy ii, dido lyubyt' ii.
Coffee getting cold. Video call in five.
Halyna, ready?
Sy tut. Bachu tebe.
Book flight for October if things stay quiet there.
Ne nado. Grosh berzhy dlya sebe.
Send meds list next week. Steve helping wire cost.
Tato, you free Saturday morning? Take Mila to zoo.
Saturday market till one. Come after.
She wants see the bees again. Last visit she was scared.
Bring proper shoes. Grass wet.
HVAC job in Fells Point running long. Might be seven.
No rush. Steaks on grill either way.
Coming down 95 now. One hour.
Truck at diner with Vasyl. Meet at house.
Knee surgery date confirmed? September 8?
Yes. Greenleaf. You still drive me home?
Yes tato. Cleared calendar week.
Fine. Uber back too if you get called.
Mila drew you a bee. Sending pic.
Frame it for me next visit.
Insurance said EOB coming for surgery. Save for Steve.
Already forwarding to Drive.
Katya calling more? She mentioned worried about you.
Fridays. Also Sundays after Halyna.
Good. She sends me pics of your kitchen. Dated tato.
It works. Not fixing.
Truck due for inspection. April.
Have appointment. Grover Automotive. 15th.
Tato, sent honey label proofs. Look Figma.
Looked. Second one clean. Approve that.
Font too heavy first one, I knew you'd say.
Boxes ordered. Cedarbrook has them.
Coming down Friday if work lets me.
Room ready. Bring warmer coat.
How's the back today?
Fine. Ibuprofen and heat pad.
See Wynn again please. Overdue.
Booked May. Enough.
Fall Classic bracket up on club site?
Roman posted Wednesday. You'll see.
Sending you dinner from Brooklyn place. Doordash.
Ne treba. Have borscht.
You always have borscht. Eat something new.
Ate the borscht. It was good.
Andriy mentioned surgery Sept 8. I take week off after.
Andriy already coming. You save days for Mila birthday.
Both then. Dad, please just accept help.
Fine. Thank you daughter.
Coffee Ridgemont five thirty?
See you there.
Sunday fishing? Schuylkill or Pine Barrens?
Barrens. Bass biting.
Caught two before eight. Photo.
Bring one over. Katya coming.
Chess club Wednesday. Bringing my son.
Good. Beginners welcome.
Slava Zsu, brother.
Slava. Read the news this morning.
Diner tomorrow six?
Panel job might run late. Try seven.
Fine. Bring the chess book.
Roster shows 38 confirmed for Spring Open.
Cap at 40. Waitlist after.
Prizes budget approved 800. OK?
Yes. Under threshold.
Ridgemont CC booked 6:30-9 both nights.
Confirmed. Boards ready in shed.
Do I email full membership again about dues?
Hold. Send only to overdue nine.
Brandon, cultural center panel breaker keeps tripping.
Sunday after Halyna call. Bring meter.
Diakuyu. Kids need lights for choir.
Wednesday latest. Not paid work.
Cavanaugh job today. 7 sharp. Bring the megger.
Rolling now. Coffee for you?
Black. From diner.
Fish tape needed on Whitman rewire tomorrow.
Copy. In truck already.
Iryna: Vidkryttya vystavky, subota, sedmaya.
Buda z Mia. Diakuyu.
Yaryna: khto pryyide na Wielykden' brunch?
Buda z synom i onukoy.
Petro: elektryka pytannia u soborni zali.
Ne v grupi. Dzvonіt' mene.
Mite treatment window opening April. Formic acid.
Twelve hives here. Ordering strips today.
Swarm alert Fox Chase area. Anyone catching?
I'll take it. Send address.
